name: property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, abnormal usage causes excessive costs. We monitor utility bills and flag abnormal usage instead of manual tracking of utility bills.
problem_solved: excessive utility costs due to abnormal usage
features: manual entry option for utility bills
